docs.title: Hello world!
docs.text:
Welcome to my corner of the web. Please remove your shoes before entering and keep in mind we're a constant work-in-progress around here.

Thanks for stopping by and feel free to connect with me if you have any questions.

docs.title: About
docs.text: I'm Arica Chhay, a Web Developer and IT Communications Specialist based in the Bay Area, California.

docs.title: Website
docs.text: Built with: MkDocs and Obsidian Theme: Material Includes: PyMdown Extensions

docs.title: Disclaimer
docs.text: The views and opinions expressed on this site are my own and do not represent the views of my employer, colleagues, friends, or family.

docs.title: Affiliate Links
docs.text: Some of the links featured on this site may be affiliate links. When you click on the link and purchase an item through that site, I may earn a small commission for recommending the item. I do not accept money for reviews or endorsements. See FTC Endorsement Guide. Your support is appreciated!
